subcodes.first_line: O Pen of the Most High! The direst of calamities, the most grievous of afflictions hath come to pass
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا قلم الاعلی قد اتت المصیبه الکبری و الرضیه العظمی اذکر من صعد الی الرفیق
subcodes.subjects: @banishments of Baha'u'llah, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prayer for the departed, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @eulogies; reminiscences, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
